# config_loader.py
import os
import sys

GLOBAL_CONFIG = None

def init_config():
    # Correct: encapsulate initialization and side effects in a function to be called explicitly
    global GLOBAL_CONFIG
    print("Initializing config...")
    GLOBAL_CONFIG = load_remote_config(os.environ["CONFIG_URL"])
    sys.path.append(GLOBAL_CONFIG["plugin_dir"])
